benefits.description: Achieving 'normal' skin for the first time; rosacea clearing at lightning speed including on nostrils which never cleared before; able to stop rosacea skin care routine

side_effects.description: Small bumps appeared during initial period ('copper uglies'); disappeared within less than a week

protocol_notes: Has rosacea, especially bad on nostrils; has always had sensitive skin and severe product reactions. KLOW appears to be a brand/form of GHK-Cu based on context. Stopped using rosacea skin care routine as it was drying skin out. Suggests lowering dose or adding zinc supplement to help with copper uglies.
